title: Crispy Tangy Japanese Bacon Stir-fry
description: This adventurous whole30-friendly dish combines crispy bacon lardon with a tangy sauce for an irresistible meal that's perfect for any craving.
instructions: Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add diced bacon and cook until crispy, about 5 minutes.
Remove bacon from the pan and set aside on a paper towel-lined plate. Leave some grease in the pan for flavoring.
In the same pan, add soy sauce, lemon juice, and minced garlic. Stir to combine and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low.
Add back the crispy bacon into the pan with the sauce. Toss everything together until evenly coated and heated through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and black pepper before serving.
